clusters.title: WA truck driver accused of Thailand murder
clusters.neutral_headline: WA truck driver accused of Thailand murder
bullet_summary: A truck driver from Western Australia is facing murder charges in Thailand after a teenage girl’s body was found inside a suitcase
Reported by The Age, Guardian Australia

items.title: WA truck driver accused of Thailand murder
items.standfirst: A truck driver from Western Australia is facing murder charges in Thailand after a teenage girl’s body was found inside a suitcase.
items.content: A truck driver from Western Australia is facing murder charges in Thailand after a teenage girl’s body was found inside a suitcase.

items.title: Australian man charged with murder in Thailand after teenage girl’s body found in suitcase
items.standfirst: Simon Peter Carman, 46, has denied the charges against himGet our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastAn Australian man has been charged with the murder of a teenage girl whose naked body was found in a suitcase in Thailand.Pattaya City police told the Guardian the man, identified as Simon Peter Carman, 46, has denied the charges against him. Continue reading...

items.title: Paul Hogan has reportedly called Pauline Hanson a ‘pelican’. Please explain?
items.standfirst: Crocodile Dundee was held up by the One Nation leader as an exemplar of ‘Australian monoculture’. Hoges had other ideasGet our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastIn one swift rhetorical blow, Crocodile Dundee has disarmed Pauline Hanson’s latest attack on multiculturalism.But his weapon of choice has left some scratching their heads.
